SQLLite.SQL: SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "DebtSeq", AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED AS "Amount", AD.DEBT_STATUS AS "Status", AD.DEFT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "DefendantPartyRoleCode", AD.DEFT_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "DefendantCasePartyNumber", AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ORIGINAL AS "OriginalDebt", AD.DEBT_CASE_NUMBER AS "CaseNumber" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_SEQ = ${param.debtSeq} AND AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} FOR UPDATE

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
